title: Author library-extraction-for-testability workflow-series and (if needed) runtime workflow.json binding
description: Workstream-template + index.md now landed at substrate/collectives/wrkstrm/.../kura-spaces/spaces/workstreams/collections/library-extraction-for-testability/ (2026-05-31). Doctrine-level extraction is complete; this bead is downgraded to cover the next-layer-down: (a) author library-extraction-for-testability.workflow-series.json under kura-spaces/series/workflows/library-extraction-for-testability/ if we want to type each task (inventory, move-files, reduce-shells, build, test, qa-evidence-update) as a separate workflow with its own steward and judges (e.g. swift-build-judge after each move, swift-test-judge after each test addition); (b) if substrate runtime-binds this workstream to a specific package's refactor (e.g. for a future migration tool), author the heavy workflow.json instance with bindingProfiles for typical SPM layouts. Both deferrable until a real need arises. Pairs with [[bead:retroactive-packetization-typed-workflow]].
